# Wirral Carpet Cleaning Limited

> Professional carpet, upholstery and biohazard cleaning across Merseyside and Cheshire. Family-run, 15+ years' experience, fully insured, DBS-checked technicians, eco-friendly hot-water extraction. Free quotes — call 0151 936 9664.

## Quick facts

- **Business name:** Wirral Carpet Cleaning Limited
- **Phone:** 0151 936 9664
- **Email:** contact@wirralcarpetcleaning.com
- **Website:** https://www.wirralcarpetcleaning.com
- **Service area:** Wirral peninsula, Liverpool, Merseyside, Cheshire — Birkenhead, Wallasey, Heswall, West Kirby, Bebington, Bromborough, Ellesmere Port, Chester, Neston, Hoylake, New Brighton, Bootle, Crosby, Formby, Prenton, Southport, St Helens, Warrington, Runcorn, Widnes
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 08:00–18:00
- **Payment:** Cash, credit card, bank transfer, Klarna (interest-free split payments)
- **Accreditations:** Fully insured, DBS-checked, NCCA-trained
- **Drying time:** 2–4 hours after cleaning
- **Booking:** Online quote, phone, or message — usually replies within 2 hours

## Services and pricing

### Domestic carpet cleaning — from £60
Hot-water extraction deep-clean for homes. Removes embedded dirt, dust mites, pet dander, food spills and allergens. Pre-treatment of all stains. Dries in 2–4 hours. First room from £60, additional rooms from £30. Hall, stairs and landing combos discounted.

### Upholstery cleaning — from £50
Sofa, armchair, dining-chair and mattress cleaning. Fabric-appropriate method (hot-water extraction, dry-clean or low-moisture). Optional Scotchgard fabric protection.

### Commercial carpet cleaning — custom quote
Offices, restaurants, hotels, schools, retail. Out-of-hours service to minimise disruption. Recurring contracts available.

### Biohazard cleaning — call for quote
Discreet, compliant decontamination of trauma scenes, unattended deaths, sewage backflow. On-site within hours. Hospital-grade disinfectants. Regulated waste disposal handled.

## Common questions and answers

**Q: How long does carpet cleaning take to dry?**
Most carpets are dry within 2–4 hours. We use truck-mount-grade extraction equipment that pulls out maximum moisture. Open windows and fans speed it up further.

**Q: Is your carpet cleaning safe for pets and children?**
Yes — all our cleaning products are eco-friendly, non-toxic and leave no harmful residue. Safe for allergy sufferers, pregnant women, infants and pets.

**Q: Can you remove stubborn stains?**
We can remove most red wine, coffee, tea, pet urine, ink, vomit and food stains. Each stain is assessed and pre-treated with the appropriate specialist solution. Some old or set-in stains may not fully lift but will significantly improve.

**Q: How much does professional carpet cleaning cost in Wirral / Liverpool?**
Domestic carpet cleaning starts from £60 for the first room and £30 per additional room. A full 3-bedroom house with hall, stairs and landing is typically £120–£180. Free quotes by phone or online form.

**Q: What method do you use?**
Hot-water extraction (also called steam cleaning). Industry gold-standard. Pre-spray with a cleaning solution → agitation → high-pressure rinse → simultaneous suction extraction. Recommended by all major carpet manufacturers.

**Q: How often should carpets be professionally cleaned?**
Every 12–18 months for most homes. Every 6 months for homes with pets, smokers or young children. Annually is the minimum for warranty compliance with most carpet manufacturers.

**Q: Do you do end-of-tenancy carpet cleaning?**
Yes — tenants and landlords both. Receipts provided for deposit-return purposes.

**Q: Are you insured?**
Yes — full public liability insurance and treatment-risk insurance. Documentation provided on request.

**Q: Do you offer same-week appointments?**
Often yes for domestic jobs, depending on slot availability. Call 0151 936 9664 to check.

- Free written quotes
- 100% satisfaction or we re-clean for free
